TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-frog_zuomei
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wawa su'lin maulah cingra tunini a wacu atu u takula'.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a wawa suʡɾin mauɾaħ ʦiŋra tunini a waʦu atu u takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a wawa su'lin maulah cingra tunini a wacu atu u takula'.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a wawa suʡɾin mauɾaħ ʦiŋra tunini a waʦu atu u takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩,他真的喜歡這隻狗跟青蛙.
There was a child who really liked the dog and the frog.

S.FORM: su'lin miala cingra tuyanan a takula' paru'en nira i kureng nira.
S.PHON: suʡɾin miaɾa ʦiŋra tujanan a takuɾaʡ paruʡən nira i kurəŋ nira.
S.FORM: su'lin miala cingra tuyanan a takula' paru'en nira i kureng nira.
S.PHON: suʡɾin miaɾa ʦiŋra tujanan a takuɾaʡ paruʡən nira i kurəŋ nira.

TRANSL.notes: 他真的想抓那隻青蛙,所以他(把青蛙)裝在他的甕裡.

S.TRANSL: 他真的想抓那隻青蛙,所以他 裝在他的甕裡.

TRANSL.notes: He really wanted to catch the frog, (so) he put (the frog) in his urn.

S.TRANSL: He really wanted to catch the frog, he put in his urn.

S.FORM: manengneng nira kura takula' su'lin a lipahak cingra.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira kura takuɾaʡ suʡɾin a ɾipaħak ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: manengneng nira kura takula' su'lin a lipahak cingra.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira kura takuɾaʡ suʡɾin a ɾipaħak ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他看到那隻青蛙,真的他非常高興.
Seeing the frog, he was really happy.

S.FORM: ta alahan nira.
S.PHON: ta aɾaħan nira.
S.FORM: ta alahan nira.
S.PHON: ta aɾaħan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他抓起 .
He took .

S.FORM: paru'han nira i kureng.
S.PHON: paruʡħan nira i kurəŋ.
S.FORM: paru'han nira i kureng.
S.PHON: paruʡħan nira i kurəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他放在甕裡.
He put in the urn.

S.FORM: maparu' nira i kureng haw.
S.PHON: maparuʡ nira i kurəŋ ħaw.
S.FORM: maparu' nira i kureng haw.
S.PHON: maparuʡ nira i kurəŋ ħaw.
S.TRANSL: 他裝在甕裡.
He put in the urn.

S.FORM: ta mafuti'awtu sa mafuti' cingra.
S.PHON: ta mafutiʡawtu sa mafutiʡ ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: ta mafuti'awtu sa mafuti' cingra.
S.PHON: ta mafutiʡawtu sa mafutiʡ ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他就睡覺了.
He slept.

S.FORM: nengneng lumuwad satu tu dafak cingra nengnenghan nira awaaytu kuya takula' itiyatu cingra mararum.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋ ɾumuwaɬ~ɮ satu tu ɬ~ɮafak ʦiŋra nəŋnəŋħan nira awaajtu kuja takuɾaʡ itijatu ʦiŋra mararum.
S.FORM: nengneng lumuwad satu tu dafak cingra nengnenghan nira awaaytu kuya takula' itiyatu cingra mararum.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋ ɾumuwaɬ~ɮ satu tu ɬ~ɮafak ʦiŋra nəŋnəŋħan nira awaajtu kuja takuɾaʡ itijatu ʦiŋra mararum.
S.TRANSL: 他早上起床,看到那隻青蛙不見了.當時他非常難過.
He got up in the morning and saw that the frog was gone. He was sad then.

S.FORM: i cuwatu kiya mitelian aku itini tuya kureng ya takula'.
S.PHON: i ʦuwatu kija mitəɾian aku itini tuja kurəŋ ja takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: i cuwatu kiya mitelian aku itini tuya kureng ya takula'.
S.PHON: i ʦuwatu kija mitəɾian aku itini tuja kurəŋ ja takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 我放在甕裡的那一隻青蛙到哪裡去了?
Where was the frog that I put in the urn?

S.FORM: sa ku rarum nu falucu' nira itiya mikilim tu cingra.
S.PHON: sa ku rarum nu faɾuʦuʡ nira itija mikiɾim tu ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: sa ku rarum nu falucu' nira itiya mikilim tu cingra.
S.PHON: sa ku rarum nu faɾuʦuʡ nira itija mikiɾim tu ʦiŋra.

TRANSL.notes: 當時他如此的傷心,他就去找(青蛙).

S.TRANSL: 當時他如此的傷心,他就去找 .

TRANSL.notes: He was so sad that he looked for (the frog).

S.TRANSL: He was so sad that he looked for .

S.FORM: nengnengitu cingra i salawacan nengnenghan nira awa matama itiyatu mararucu' su'lin a tata'ak a latek tayni i lutuk.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋitu ʦiŋra i saɾawaʦan nəŋnəŋħan nira awa matama itijatu mararuʦuʡ suʡɾin a tataʡak a ɾatək tajni i ɾutuk.
S.FORM: nengnengitu cingra i salawacan nengnenghan nira awa matama itiyatu mararucu' su'lin a tata'ak a latek tayni i lutuk.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋitu ʦiŋra i saɾawaʦan nəŋnəŋħan nira awa matama itijatu mararuʦuʡ suʡɾin a tataʡak a ɾatək tajni i ɾutuk.
S.TRANSL: 他開始在四周觀望,他看了也沒找到,可能去了山上.

TRANSL.notes: He started to look around, but didn't find it; perhaps (the frog) went to the mountain.

S.TRANSL: He started to look around, but didn't find it; perhaps went to the mountain.

S.FORM: i cuwacuwa kiya sa'an.
S.PHON: i ʦuwaʦuwa kija saʡan.
S.FORM: i cuwacuwa kiya sa'an.
S.PHON: i ʦuwaʦuwa kija saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 究竟在哪裡呢?他這麼說.
'Where is it?', he said.

S.FORM: su'lin taynitu cingra i lutuk a mikilim tuyanan a takula' ya kaulahan nira a takula'.
S.PHON: suʡɾin tajnitu ʦiŋra i ɾutuk a mikiɾim tujanan a takuɾaʡ ja kauɾaħan nira a takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: su'lin taynitu cingra i lutuk a mikilim tuyanan a takula' ya kaulahan nira a takula'.
S.PHON: suʡɾin tajnitu ʦiŋra i ɾutuk a mikiɾim tujanan a takuɾaʡ ja kauɾaħan nira a takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他真的來到山上找那隻青蛙,那一隻他最喜歡的青蛙
He really came to the mountain to look for the frog, which he liked most.

S.FORM: rumakattu cingra tayni i lalan i lutulutukan.
S.PHON: rumakattu ʦiŋra tajni i ɾaɾan i ɾutuɾutukan.
S.FORM: rumakattu cingra tayni i lalan i lutulutukan.
S.PHON: rumakattu ʦiŋra tajni i ɾaɾan i ɾutuɾutukan.
S.TRANSL: 他開始走往山上的路.
He walked on the road to the mountains.

S.FORM: su'lin nengnenghan nira a latek itini i tepung nuna suta' unini kiya nasa ku harateng nira.
S.PHON: suʡɾin nəŋnəŋħan nira a ɾatək itini i təpuŋ nuna sutaʡ unini kija nasa ku ħaratəŋ nira.
S.FORM: su'lin nengnenghan nira a latek itini i tepung nuna suta' unini kiya nasa ku harateng nira.
S.PHON: suʡɾin nəŋnəŋħan nira a ɾatək itini i təpuŋ nuna sutaʡ unini kija nasa ku ħaratəŋ nira.
S.TRANSL: 真的他看了之後,可能在這個土堆的洞裡,他覺得就是這樣.

TRANSL.notes: He looked around and he thought that perhaps (the frog) was in the hole on the ground.

S.TRANSL: He looked around and he thought that perhaps was in the hole on the ground.

S.FORM: anganghan nira miangang kuyanan a takula' nira miceli' nengnenghan nira sadak sa'an unini u ku u kulafaw.
S.PHON: aŋaŋħan nira miaŋaŋ kujanan a takuɾaʡ nira miʦəɾiʡ nəŋnəŋħan nira saɬ~ɮak saʡan unini u ku u kuɾafaw.
S.FORM: anganghan nira miangang kuyanan a takula' nira miceli' nengnenghan nira sadak sa'an unini u ku u kulafaw.
S.PHON: aŋaŋħan nira miaŋaŋ kujanan a takuɾaʡ nira miʦəɾiʡ nəŋnəŋħan nira saɬ~ɮak saʡan unini u ku u kuɾafaw.
S.TRANSL: 他呼叫那隻青蛙,結果出來的是田鼠.
He called the frog, and it turned out that a vole came out.

S.FORM: itira kacekuk nu falucu' nira a minengneng tuya kulafaw.
S.PHON: itira kaʦəkuk nu faɾuʦuʡ nira a minəŋnəŋ tuja kuɾafaw.
S.FORM: itira kacekuk nu falucu' nira a minengneng tuya kulafaw.
S.PHON: itira kaʦəkuk nu faɾuʦuʡ nira a minəŋnəŋ tuja kuɾafaw.
S.TRANSL: 他看到那隻田鼠非常驚嚇.
He was surprised to see the vole.

S.FORM: su'lin a mapacekuk milaliwtu kiya wacu nira.
S.PHON: suʡɾin a mapaʦəkuk miɾaɾiwtu kija waʦu nira.
S.FORM: su'lin a mapacekuk milaliwtu kiya wacu nira.
S.PHON: suʡɾin a mapaʦəkuk miɾaɾiwtu kija waʦu nira.
S.TRANSL: 真的那隻狗也驚嚇到跑掉了.
The dog was frightened and ran away.

S.FORM: matira cakat sa cingra maru' tayra tuya kilang.
S.PHON: matira ʦakat sa ʦiŋra maruʡ tajra tuja kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: matira cakat sa cingra maru' tayra tuya kilang.
S.PHON: matira ʦakat sa ʦiŋra maruʡ tajra tuja kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 在這個狀況下,他上去坐在木頭上.
Under such circumstances, he went up and sat on the wood.

S.FORM: itira tiya kilang a latek ira tuna epung nuya kilang oya takula' aku nasa ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: itira tija kiɾaŋ a ɾatək ira tuna əpuŋ nuja kiɾaŋ o~uja takuɾaʡ aku nasa ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: itira tiya kilang a latek ira tuna epung nuya kilang oya takula' aku nasa ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: itira tija kiɾaŋ a ɾatək ira tuna əpuŋ nuja kiɾaŋ o~uja takuɾaʡ aku nasa ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.

TRANSL.notes: (青蛙)可能在樹洞裡,他這麼認為.

S.TRANSL: 可能在樹洞裡,他這麼認為.

TRANSL.notes: Perhaps (the frog) was in the hole of the tree, he thought so.

S.TRANSL: Perhaps was in the hole of the tree, he thought so.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira a miceli' kuya takula' nira tiya epung niya kilang.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira a miʦəɾiʡ kuja takuɾaʡ nira tija əpuŋ nija kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira a miceli' kuya takula' nira tiya epung niya kilang.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira a miʦəɾiʡ kuja takuɾaʡ nira tija əpuŋ nija kiɾaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 他呼叫那隻青蛙,對著樹木的洞口(呼叫).

S.TRANSL: 他呼叫那隻青蛙,對著樹木的洞口 .

TRANSL.notes: He called the frog; (he called) towards the hole of the tree.

S.TRANSL: He called the frog; towards the hole of the tree.

S.FORM: sadak sa'an tiya XXXX ya miceli'an tiya epung nuya kilang sadak sa u anikak.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮak saʡan tija xxxx ja miʦəɾiʡan tija əpuŋ nuja kiɾaŋ saɬ~ɮak sa u anikak.
S.FORM: sadak sa'an tiya XXXX ya miceli'an tiya epung nuya kilang sadak sa u anikak.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮak saʡan tija xxxx ja miʦəɾiʡan tija əpuŋ nuja kiɾaŋ saɬ~ɮak sa u anikak.
S.TRANSL: 他對著樹洞裡呼叫,出來的是烏鴉.
He shouted towards the tree hole, but a crow went out.

S.FORM: matalaw cingra matefad a malukelun a itira i suta' cingra.
S.PHON: mataɾaw ʦiŋra matəfaɬ~ɮ a maɾukəɾun a itira i sutaʡ ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: matalaw cingra matefad a malukelun a itira i suta' cingra.
S.PHON: mataɾaw ʦiŋra matəfaɬ~ɮ a maɾukəɾun a itira i sutaʡ ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他很害怕,翻滾著掉下來在地上.
He was scared and fell down and tumbled onto the ground.

S.FORM: ya wacu sa nira su'lin matalawtu.
S.PHON: ja waʦu sa nira suʡɾin mataɾawtu.
S.FORM: ya wacu sa nira su'lin matalawtu.
S.PHON: ja waʦu sa nira suʡɾin mataɾawtu.
S.TRANSL: 他那隻狗也是非常害怕.
His dog was scared as well.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira su'lin matalaw tiya mi angangan nira a anikak matalaw cangra.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira suʡɾin mataɾaw tija mi aŋaŋan nira a anikak mataɾaw ʦaŋra.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira su'lin matalaw tiya mi angangan nira a anikak matalaw cangra.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira suʡɾin mataɾaw tija mi aŋaŋan nira a anikak mataɾaw ʦaŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他們真的很怕他呼叫的那隻烏鴉.
They were really afraid of the crow that he shouted at.

S.FORM: kaitinitu ku nga'ayay tuna fukeluh.
S.PHON: kaitinitu ku ŋaʡajaj tuna fukəɾuħ.
S.FORM: kaitinitu ku nga'ayay tuna fukeluh.
S.PHON: kaitinitu ku ŋaʡajaj tuna fukəɾuħ.
S.TRANSL: 倒不如在這個磐石上.
It would be better to stay on the rock.

S.FORM: itira kaku a ca'ay karawis sa'an.
S.PHON: itira kaku a ʦaʡaj karawis saʡan.
S.FORM: itira kaku a ca'ay karawis sa'an.
S.PHON: itira kaku a ʦaʡaj karawis saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 我在磐石上又勾不住,他這麼說.
'I couldn't keep a fast hold on the rock,' he said.

S.FORM: tayra tuya fukeluh cingra i tuya a tumireng.
S.PHON: tajra tuja fukəɾuħ ʦiŋra i tuja a tumirəŋ.
S.FORM: tayra tuya fukeluh cingra i tuya a tumireng.
S.PHON: tajra tuja fukəɾuħ ʦiŋra i tuja a tumirəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 倒不如站起來.
would rather stand up.

S.FORM: su'lin tumireng cingra maaraw nira kunini siri nu lutuk.
S.PHON: suʡɾin tumirəŋ ʦiŋra maaraw nira kunini siri nu ɾutuk.
S.FORM: su'lin tumireng cingra maaraw nira kunini siri nu lutuk.
S.PHON: suʡɾin tumirəŋ ʦiŋra maaraw nira kunini siri nu ɾutuk.
S.TRANSL: 他真的站起來,看到一隻山羊.
He really stood up, seeing a goat.

S.FORM: itirahu ku katalaw nu falucu' nira.
S.PHON: itiraħu ku kataɾaw nu faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: itirahu ku katalaw nu falucu' nira.
S.PHON: itiraħu ku kataɾaw nu faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 再一次,他感到害怕.
He felt scared again.

S.FORM: cumikaytu tala cuwacuwatu mafukiltu cingra.
S.PHON: ʦumikajtu taɾa ʦuwaʦuwatu mafukiɾtu ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: cumikaytu tala cuwacuwatu mafukiltu cingra.
S.PHON: ʦumikajtu taɾa ʦuwaʦuwatu mafukiɾtu ʦiŋra.

TRANSL.notes: 快跑地(離開),他不知道往哪一個方向.

S.TRANSL: 快跑地 ,他不知道往哪一個方向.
Running away, he didn't know where he went.

S.FORM: hinamhan ta kefeng itini i i ranum itiratu cingra danguy satu a midanguy tuni katalaw tuyanan a siri.
S.PHON: ħinamħan ta kəfəŋ itini i i ranum itiratu ʦiŋra ɬ~ɮaŋuj satu a miɬ~ɮaŋuj tuni kataɾaw tujanan a siri.
S.FORM: hinamhan ta kefeng itini i i ranum itiratu cingra danguy satu a midanguy tuni katalaw tuyanan a siri.
S.PHON: ħinamħan ta kəfəŋ itini i i ranum itiratu ʦiŋra ɬ~ɮaŋuj satu a miɬ~ɮaŋuj tuni kataɾaw tujanan a siri.
S.TRANSL: 結果他掉到水裡,他就在那邊游泳,因為怕那隻山羊.
He fell into the water and swam there for fear of the goat.

S.FORM: su'lin maanen talahekaltu cingra na midanguy.
S.PHON: suʡɾin maanən taɾaħəkaɾtu ʦiŋra na miɬ~ɮaŋuj.
S.FORM: su'lin maanen talahekaltu cingra na midanguy.
S.PHON: suʡɾin maanən taɾaħəkaɾtu ʦiŋra na miɬ~ɮaŋuj.
S.TRANSL: 真的怎麼辦呢?他就游上岸.
What could he do? He swam to the shore.

S.FORM: manengneng nira ku ccay a kilang mapuhedaytu a kilang maepung ku sifu' nira a latek itini kuya takula' aku.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira ku ʦʦaj a kiɾaŋ mapuħəɬ~ɮajtu a kiɾaŋ maəpuŋ ku sifuʡ nira a ɾatək itini kuja takuɾaʡ aku.
S.FORM: manengneng nira ku ccay a kilang mapuhedaytu a kilang maepung ku sifu' nira a latek itini kuya takula' aku.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira ku ʦʦaj a kiɾaŋ mapuħəɬ~ɮajtu a kiɾaŋ maəpuŋ ku sifuʡ nira a ɾatək itini kuja takuɾaʡ aku.
S.TRANSL: 他看到一塊木頭,已經腐朽的木頭中間有一個洞,我的青蛙可能在這裡.
He saw a piece of wood, and there was a hole in the middle of the rotten wood. Perhaps my frog was here.

S.FORM: nasa ku hinatala nira tu karaheker nira a mikilim.
S.PHON: nasa ku ħinataɾa nira tu karaħəkər nira a mikiɾim.
S.FORM: nasa ku hinatala nira tu karaheker nira a mikilim.
S.PHON: nasa ku ħinataɾa nira tu karaħəkər nira a mikiɾim.
S.TRANSL: 認為可能那隻青蛙可以找到,期盼的心情就放鬆了.

TRANSL.notes: He felt relieved because he thought that he could find (his frog).

S.TRANSL: He felt relieved because he thought that he could find .

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira ira ku tatusaay a takula' manengneng nira.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira ira ku tatusaaj a takuɾaʡ manəŋnəŋ nira.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira ira ku tatusaay a takula' manengneng nira.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira ira ku tatusaaj a takuɾaʡ manəŋnəŋ nira.
S.TRANSL: 他看到有兩隻青蛙.
He saw there were two frogs.

S.FORM: i iniitu sa cingra.
S.PHON: i iniitu sa ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: i iniitu sa cingra.
S.PHON: i iniitu sa ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他說:「原來在這裡」.
'It's here,' he said.

S.FORM: celi'han nira su'lin miceli'tu kiya takula' itini i cingranan.
S.PHON: ʦəɾiʡħan nira suʡɾin miʦəɾiʡtu kija takuɾaʡ itini i ʦiŋranan.
S.FORM: celi'han nira su'lin miceli'tu kiya takula' itini i cingranan.
S.PHON: ʦəɾiʡħan nira suʡɾin miʦəɾiʡtu kija takuɾaʡ itini i ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: 他呼叫著,真的那隻青蛙也跟著呼叫他.
He called, and the frog also called him.

S.FORM: nengneng papinengneng hatu nira miceli' niya takula' cingra.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋ papinəŋnəŋ ħatu nira miʦəɾiʡ nija takuɾaʡ ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: nengneng papinengneng hatu nira miceli' niya takula' cingra.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋ papinəŋnəŋ ħatu nira miʦəɾiʡ nija takuɾaʡ ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他看了又看,呼叫著那隻青蛙.
He kept looking and called the frog.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira su'lin adihaytu ku wawa nira.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira suʡɾin aɬ~ɮiħajtu ku wawa nira.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira su'lin adihaytu ku wawa nira.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira suʡɾin aɬ~ɮiħajtu ku wawa nira.
S.TRANSL: 真的很多孩子 .
There were many children.

S.FORM: anca widang nira hakini sa ku raheker nu falucu' nira nanuyantu i.
S.PHON: anʦa wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira ħakini sa ku raħəkər nu faɾuʦuʡ nira nanujantu i.
S.FORM: anca widang nira hakini sa ku raheker nu falucu' nira nanuyantu i.
S.PHON: anʦa wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira ħakini sa ku raħəkər nu faɾuʦuʡ nira nanujantu i.
S.TRANSL: 還是他的朋友呢?他就安心了.
Or his friends? He felt relieved.

S.FORM: itiratu i tiya katefadan nira a tiya nanum itiraentu nira a palipahak kuyanan a takula'.
S.PHON: itiratu i tija katəfaɬ~ɮan nira a tija nanum itiraəntu nira a paɾipaħak kujanan a takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: itiratu i tiya katefadan nira a tiya nanum itiraentu nira a palipahak kuyanan a takula'.
S.PHON: itiratu i tija katəfaɬ~ɮan nira a tija nanum itiraəntu nira a paɾipaħak kujanan a takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 在他掉落的水裡,他就在那邊讓青蛙快樂.
He made the frog happy there in the water where he fell.

S.FORM: saka matiniay kuniniyan a sasuwalen aku anini saka.
S.PHON: saka matiniaj kuninijan a sasuwaɾən aku anini saka.
S.FORM: saka matiniay kuniniyan a sasuwalen aku anini saka.
S.PHON: saka matiniaj kuninijan a sasuwaɾən aku anini saka.
S.TRANSL: 我現在敘述的情形是如此.
My description is like this.

S.FORM: malepuntu ku sasuwalen aku.
S.PHON: maɾəpuntu ku sasuwaɾən aku.
S.FORM: malepuntu ku sasuwalen aku.
S.PHON: maɾəpuntu ku sasuwaɾən aku.
S.TRANSL: 我說的結束了/我講完了.
I'm done.
